title: Graduate Program — Faculty Resources
text:
A collection of links and documents useful for faculty advising graduate students.

Graduate Handbook
The official handbook covering program requirements, policies, and procedures.
View Graduate Handbook


Admission System
Review and evaluate graduate applicants through the admission system.
Visit the Admission System Website


Offer Letter Request Form
Submit a request to generate an offer letter for a new or existing student. See the Offer Letter page for more details.
Submit Offer Letter Request

title: Offer Letter Request
text:
Use the form below (or the button) to submit an offer letter request for a new or existing graduate student. The form will notify the Graduate Program Coordinator and relevant staff once submitted.
Submit Offer Letter Request

title: Offer Letter Request
text:
What to Prepare
Before filling out the form, have the following information ready:

Student name — full legal name for new admits, or select from the dropdown for existing students
Degree program — MS or PhD
Funding sources and cost objects — one per line, separated by |
Annual salary / stipend amount
Funding breakdown by cost object
Funding start and end dates
Years of secured funding
Funding plan beyond the secured period (new students only, if fewer than 4 years secured)

title: Offer Letter Request
text:
After Submission
Once the form is submitted:

An email summary is sent to the Graduate Program Coordinator and staff.
The offer letter is generated and shared with you.

For questions, contact the Graduate Committee Chair at tmieno2@nebraska.edu.
